runTitle: Production AI Feedback Trace E2E - Feedback Success + Monitoring Match
skippedSurfaces: Langfuse direct traceUrl/htmlPath deep link (monitoring payload still omitted direct traceUrl)

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI sidebar free-text query ВЮ┤ьЏё ВІцВаю feedback clickЖ╣їВДђ ВѕўьќЅьќѕЖ│а feedback API bodyВЌљ traceIdЖ░ђ ьЈгьЋевљўвіћ Ж▓ЃВЮё вИївЮ╝Вџ░ВађВЌљВёю ВДЂВаЉ В║АВ▓ўьќѕвІц.
вЈЎВЮ╝ feedback traceId(UUID ьўЋВІЮ)вАю Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?q=<traceId> ВА░ьџїЖ░ђ count=1вАю вДцВ╣ГвљўВќ┤ supervisor-execution traceвЦ╝ ьЎЋВЮИьќѕвІц.

notes: Browser-captured POST /api/ai/feedback body included traceId c92418ce-c612-4889-af61-7ee54c96f47a and returned langfuseStatus=success.
Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?q=c92418ce-c612-4889-af61-7ee54c96f47a&limit=5&includeAuxiliary=true returned count=1 with supervisor-execution trace for the same query.
The matched monitoring trace id remained UUID-formatted (not 32-hex), so direct lookup should continue using the raw UUID currently exposed to the UI.
Current /monitoring/traces payload still did not expose a direct traceUrl/htmlPath link; trace lookup itself succeeded without it.

links.label: Cloud Run monitoring trace lookup for feedback traceId
